name: ACM Certificate
description: AWS Certificate Manager SSL/TLS certificate for securing domains

inputs.name: domain_name
inputs.label: Domain Name
inputs.description: Primary domain name for the certificate (e.g. example.com or *.example.com)

inputs.name: subject_alternative_names
inputs.label: Additional Domain Names (SANs)
inputs.description: Comma-separated additional domain names to include in the certificate

inputs.name: validation_method
inputs.label: Validation Method
inputs.description: DNS validation is recommended (automatic with Route53). Email requires manual action.

inputs.name: wait_for_validation
inputs.label: Wait for Validation
inputs.description: Block until the certificate is fully validated and issued. Recommended: true.

inputs.name: certificate_transparency_logging_preference
inputs.label: Certificate Transparency Logging
inputs.description: Enable Certificate Transparency logging (required by most browsers, recommended: ENABLED)

inputs.name: key_algorithm
inputs.label: Key Algorithm
inputs.description: Algorithm for the certificate key. RSA_2048 is the standard. EC keys are smaller and faster.

inputs.name: create_route53_records
inputs.label: Auto-create Route53 DNS Records
inputs.description: Automatically create Route53 DNS validation records (requires Route53 zone to exist)

inputs.name: zone_id
inputs.label: Route53 Zone ID
inputs.description: Route53 hosted zone ID for automatic DNS validation record creation
